title: IncludeScript Library
text: IncludeScript Library An IncludeScript Library contains IncludeScript objects, which can be inserted into ProcScript using the #include directive and are resolved during compilation. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: libinc Main Development Object? Yes Part of: — Contains: Property , IncludeScript Generalization: Main Development Object , Library Specializations: Compilation Output: — URI format: libinc: LibraryName Specialization IncludeScript Library specializes Main Development Object and Library in the following ways: It can only contain IncludeScript fragments. Related Links IncludeScripts IncludeScripts are fragments of ProcScript or JavaScript that are inserted into components during compilation. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
